# akeyless_folder (Resource)

Folder Resource



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The name to the folder

### Optional

- `delete_protection` (String) Protection from accidental deletion of this folder [true/false]
- `description` (String) Description of the object
- `tags` (Set of String) List of tags attached to this folder

### Read-Only

- `folder_id` (Number) The ID of the folder
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
